name: Credit Repair Resource Center Milpitas
description_short: ASAP Credit Repair is a family-owned credit repair company in Milpitas, CA that disputes negative items on credit reports and offers free credit consultations with a 73% success rate.
description_long:
ASAP Credit Repair Milpitas, CA was founded in 2008 as a family-owned business specializing in credit repair services. The company was established to provide quick and affordable credit repair options for consumers with poor credit histories, while also serving as an educational hub for financial and credit literacy. The founders prioritized both rapid response times and low-cost service delivery, recognizing that many credit repair firms charge high recurring monthly fees.

The company offers several core services including free credit analysis and consultations provided by credit counselors who review credit reports and develop customized plans to remove negative entries. They employ customized dispute methods tailored to individual accounts on credit reports rather than using one-size-fits-all approaches. ASAP claims an industry-leading success rate of over 73% and backs their work with a Money Back Promise. Additional services include guidance on rapid credit-building strategies, credit inquiries explanation, credit card recommendations for bad credit, loan options, business credit building, and financial education resources.

ASAP differentiates itself through its pay-for-service model rather than recurring monthly subscriptions, positioning itself as more economical than competitors. They emphasize speed of service and claim to help clients nationwide. The company offers free attorney advice and reports over 1,500 Google reviews. They provide educational content on various credit-related topics including factual dispute methods, secured credit cards, and credit monitoring considerations.

Key limitations include reliance on unverified claims about success rates and limited independent verification of results. The website lacks specific pricing transparency, instead directing consumers to call for quotes. Claims about the 73% success rate and 1,500+ reviews are not independently substantiated on the visible website. Like all credit repair companies, results depend heavily on the validity of disputed items and consumer circumstances beyond the company's control.
address: 1879 Lundy Ave ste 148, San Jose, CA 95131

company_info.headquarters: 1879 Lundy Ave ste 148, San Jose, CA 95131

pros: Free credit analysis and consultation with no upfront costs
Claims 73% success rate with customized dispute strategies per account
Money Back Promise to protect client investment
Pay-for-service model without recurring monthly subscriptions
20+ years of combined experience and founded in 2008
Offers free attorney advice as part of consultation
Serves clients nationwide, not limited to local area
Provides educational resources on credit-related topics beyond repair services
cons: No transparent pricing listed on website; requires phone call to get cost estimates
Success rate claims (73%) are not independently verified or substantiated
Over 1,500 Google reviews claimed but not linked or verifiable from website
Limited detail on actual dispute process and timeline for results
Money Back Promise terms and conditions not detailed on website
best_for: Consumers with negative items on credit reports seeking affordable dispute services
People looking for free initial credit assessment before committing to paid services
Individuals wanting personalized credit repair strategies rather than generic approaches
Those seeking educational resources alongside credit repair assistance
diagnosis: Best for consumers with documented negative items on their credit reports who want affordable, customized dispute services without monthly subscription fees. Primary caveat: success depends on whether disputed items are actually inaccurate; credit repair companies cannot remove accurate negative information, and results are not guaranteed despite the Money Back Promise.
services: Free credit analysis and assessment (2-minute online form)
Credit report review and evaluation by credit counselors
Customized credit repair plans for removing negative entries
Factual dispute methods tailored to individual accounts
Ongoing customized disputes for credit report items
Credit card recommendations for bad credit
Loan options guidance for bad credit borrowers
Business credit building education and guidance
